Findings.Title: MITRE ATT&CK tactic Initial Access has zero analytics rules
Findings.Detail: Workspace law-soc has 0 enabled rules covering TA0001 (Initial Access).
Findings.Remediation: Enable Microsoft 365 Defender phishing detection templates.

Findings.Title: Defender for Cloud connector disabled
Findings.Detail: Sentinel data connector 'AzureSecurityCenter' is disabled on workspace law-soc.
Findings.Remediation: Enable the Defender for Cloud connector in Sentinel.

Findings.Title: Defender for Endpoint connector active
Findings.Detail: MDE connector enabled with bi-directional sync.
